title: juncus kraussii
intro: Juncus kraussii, also known as the Rush or Jointed Rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, Juncus kraussii has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Juncus kraussii include the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its use as a diuretic to help alleviate urinary tract infections. Juncus kraussii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be found in some herbal remedies in the form of teas, tinctures, and poultices.
